title: Cinematic Minimalist Orange Red Silhouette Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Minimalist Orange Red Silhouette Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic minimalist portrait of lone adult man in a quiet standing silhouette standing inside striking orange-to-red gradient environment. Subject: lone adult man in a quiet standing silhouette appears as a lone figure with stripped-back human presence, calm posture, and a dramatic backlit silhouette rather than detailed fashion styling. Scene: striking orange-to-red gradient environment surrounds the figure with deep shadow contrast, empty atmosphere, and a mirror-like reflective floor that doubles the silhouette. Composition: Perfectly symmetrical centered framing with upright still pose facing forward at the center of the reflective floor, strong negative space, clean horizon reflection, and a minimal gallery-like portrait structure. Signature Elements: Preserved cinematic minimalist orange red silhouette portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Stripped-back cinematic minimalism, high-contrast silhouette photography, abstract color-field environment, reflective-floor editorial portrait, and premium poster-like restraint. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Dramatic backlight from the gradient field, deep shadowed subject front, glowing rim outline, reflective floor bounce, and controlled high-contrast exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic minimalist portrait of solitary adult male figure with a calm cinematic presence standing inside burning red-orange abstract studio space fading into deep shadow. Scene: burning red-orange abstract studio space fading into deep shadow surrounds the figure with deep shadow contrast, empty atmosphere, and a mirror-like reflective floor that doubles the silhouette. Composition: Perfectly symmetrical centered framing with motionless centered stance with arms relaxed and body reduced to a clean silhouette, strong negative space, clean horizon reflection, and a minimal gallery-like portrait structure.
